page.title: Settings
page.description: Adjust teammate hand-card preview scale, offset, and rule-based border highlights.
toggleKey.label: Toggle Key
toggleKey.description: Records a keyboard shortcut; supports modifier-only bindings (e.g. Shift) and modifier combos.
contentScale.label: Content Size
contentScale.description: Scales the mini card previews shown beside each teammate.
offsetX.label: Horizontal Offset
offsetX.description: Moves the hand-card row horizontally after automatic anchor adjustment.
offsetY.label: Vertical Offset
offsetY.description: Moves the hand-card row vertically after automatic anchor adjustment.
manualPositioning.label: Enable manual positioning
manualPositioning.description: Lets you drag each teammate hand row directly during combat and saves the offset by slot.
reserveWidth.label: Reserve original width
reserveWidth.description: Keeps width reserved inside the original player info row. Turn this off for pure overlay positioning.
resetSlotPositions.label: Reset dragged positions
resetSlotPositions.description: Clears all saved per-slot hand-row offsets.
rules.label: Highlight Rules
rules.description: Each rule can use text, regex, or native template matching.
rule.validation.pattern_required: A text or regex rule must provide a pattern
rule.validation.template_required: A template rule must define at least one condition
runtimeHotkey.toggle.description: Shows or hides the teammate hand card overlay.
